name: arcane-os
description: Shared application interface runtime and native-capable application workspace for Arcane OS.

scripts.test: node --test test/ai.test.mjs test/ollama.test.mjs test/ollama-settings.test.mjs test/app-packager.test.mjs test/basic-user-apps.test.mjs test/boss-chat-integration.test.mjs test/boss-library-manifest.test.mjs test/boss-library-page.test.mjs test/boss-library-runtime.test.mjs test/boss-library-setup.test.mjs test/boss-modelfile.test.mjs test/communications.test.mjs test/component-contracts.test.mjs test/configured-ai-chat-session.test.mjs test/developer-app.test.mjs test/developer-reference.test.mjs test/developer-setup.test.mjs test/development-workspace.test.mjs test/directory-picker.test.mjs test/errors.test.mjs test/file-manager-component.test.mjs test/intent-envelope.test.mjs test/mail-transport.test.mjs test/machine-check-order.test.mjs test/modal-component.test.mjs test/rc-governance-docs.test.mjs test/redress-behavior-components.test.mjs test/redress-shared-shell-components.test.mjs test/theme-manager-system-appearance.test.mjs test/terminal.test.mjs test/utility-apps.test.mjs test/warrior-spirit-app.test.mjs
scripts.test:redress: node --test apps/redress/test/app-shell.test.mjs apps/redress/test/case-importer.test.mjs apps/redress/test/case-model.test.mjs apps/redress/test/case-repository.test.mjs apps/redress/test/evidence-descriptor.test.mjs apps/redress/test/legal-prompts.test.mjs apps/redress/test/modelfile.test.mjs
scripts.check:boss-public: npm run test:boss-public && node tools/package-app.mjs check boss
scripts.check:public-apps: npm run test:boss-public && node tools/package-app.mjs check --all
scripts.check: npm run verify:package-locks && npm test && npm run test:redress && npm run check:public-apps && npm run test:machine
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run check:windows
